memoryArtifacts.headline: A Completely Fictional Character
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir John de Baguley

A COMPLETELY FICTIONAL CHARACTER.

A TOTALLY ORPHANED LINE, and he died before his children were born.


This may be is the Sir John Bagley mentioned in the opening paragraph of t …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Baguley於1172年出生在英國英格蘭爾巴可洛福 希爾時，他的父親Sir William de Baguley24歲，母親Matilda21歲。他於1195年與Ellen de Huyton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Baguley于1172年出生在英国英格兰爾巴可洛福 希爾时，他的父亲Sir William de Baguley24岁，母亲Matilda21岁。他于1195年与Ellen de Huyton在英国英格兰藍卡爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baguley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley (Cheshire). The placename is from Old English bagga denoting an unidentified animal, perhaps the badger, + lēah ‘wood, clearing’. Compare Bagley .

variants.name: Bagley
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley in Cheshire or from any of several places called Bagley, in Devon, Gloucestershire, Shropshire, Somerset, and Yorkshire. These get their names either from the Old English personal name Bacga + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ or from an unattested Old English word, bagga, for a ‘bag-shaped’ object or creature + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Baguley was born in 1172, in Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William de Baguley, was 24 and his mother, Matilda, was 21. He married Ellen de Huyton in 1195, in Huyton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Baguley est né en 1172, à Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Baguley, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Matilda, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Ellen de Huyton en 1195, à Huyton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Baguley 1172 in Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Baguley 24 und seine Mutter Matilda 21. Er hat 1195 in Huyton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Ellen de Huyton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Baguley è nato il nel 1172 nel Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William de Baguley, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Matilda, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Ellen de Huyton nel 1195, nel Huyton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Baguleyが1172年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブックロウ ヒルで生まれた時，父Sir William de Baguleyは24歳，母Matildaは21歳であった。1195年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアハイトンでEllen de Huytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Baguley(이)가 1172년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 벅로 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Baguley(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 후이턴에서 Ellen de Huyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Baguley родился в 1172 г. в местности букклоу хилл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William de Baguley было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen de Huyton в 1195 г. в местности хуитон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в его родном городе.
